name: com.tutan.messages
description: Zero-allocation, struct-based publish/subscribe message bus for Unity 6 and XR. Ref-passed handlers, integer subscription tokens, thread-safe enqueue, automatic LateUpdate draining, and dedicated EventBus (N:M) and CommandBus (N:1) APIs. Built for XR frame budgets — no GC in the dispatch hot path.

samples.description: A live score driven by both buses: a button publishes commands, a background thread enqueues commands off the main thread, and the score UI listens for events. One self-contained scene, no wiring.
